title: [Immersive Vehicles] IAV Parts pack
description: The Industrial Association of Vehicle Manufacturers is a collaborative parts pack for Immersive vehicles, adding a wide array of parts, and unique crafting with custom recipies for Immersive Engineering.
body:
The Industrial Association of Vehicle Manufacturers is a collaborative parts pack for Immersive vehicles, adding a wide array of parts, and unique crafting recipies with custom recipies for Immersive Engineering. 

At the moment IAV related packs are:

-Mackrel Autmotive Industries : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mackrel-automotive-industries

-VEB Schwikau Auto Works : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-vehicles-automobilwerke-schwikau-veb

-IV Farming : https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/randall-agriculture-pack
-ZD Military Vehicles: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zd-military-vehicles

 

IAV will however work with most if not all convention compliant packs.
